nodes.label: safe-docx Bridge — Deterministic surgical DOCX editing for Kairo Phantom. =====
True if npx is available (safe-docx is invoked via npx).
Read a DOCX file and return paragraphs with stable _bk_NNN IDs.     Uses: npx @
Find text in a DOCX file and return matching paragraph IDs.     Uses: @usejunio
Surgically replace text in a specific paragraph, producing both a     clean cop
Convenience: grep for pattern → get paragraph ID → replace text.     Returns bo
Apply a batch of edits sequentially using safe-docx.     Each edit in `edits` m
Call safe-docx as a subprocess via npx.     Constructs: npx @usejunior/safe-doc
Extract the first _bk_NNN paragraph ID from a grep result.
